create_time.description: The timestamp when the place index was created.

data_source.description: The data source used for the place index.

data_source_configuration.description: Configuration details of the data source, including its intended use.

description.description: A brief explanation or details about the place index.

id.description: The unique identifier for the place index.

index_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the place index.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs used to organize and manage the place index.

update_time.description: The timestamp when the place index was last updated.
